summary: Extract structured tables from PDF documents and convert them into editable Excel spreadsheets using AI-powered field extraction. Handle both digital PDFs and scanned documents with OCR technology, supporting batch processing and custom field selection for accurate data conversion.

howItWorksSteps: Upload your PDF file containing tables to the platform
AI identifies and maps table structures automatically
Select specific fields or columns you want to extract
Download the converted Excel file with structured table data
whyPdfExcelAiFits: AI automatically detects table boundaries and column headers
OCR handles scanned PDFs and image-based table content

faq.question: Can I extract tables from scanned PDF documents?
faq.answer: Yes, our OCR technology can extract tables from scanned PDFs and image-based documents, though accuracy depends on scan quality and text clarity.

faq.question: What happens to complex table formatting during extraction?
faq.answer: Basic table structure is preserved, but complex formatting like merged cells or nested tables may require manual review and adjustment in the output Excel file.

faq.question: How many PDF tables can I process at once?
faq.answer: You can batch process multiple PDF files simultaneously, with each document's tables extracted into separate Excel worksheets or files.

faq.question: Do you support multi-page PDF tables that span across pages?
faq.answer: Yes, our AI can handle tables that continue across multiple PDF pages and consolidate them into a single Excel worksheet.
